Our Services

Tailored protection and risk management solutions delivered by experienced professionals.

Security Services

A leading provider of comprehensive security services.

Our security services are tailored to the specific threat profile and requirements of each client. Every engagement is delivered by experienced professionals with military and law enforcement backgrounds who understand the demands of operating in complex and high-profile environments.

  • Close protection for individuals and families
  • Protective surveillance and advance operations
  • Covert protection for clients requiring a discreet presence
  • Residential and venue security assessments
  • Event and travel security planning

Diplomatic & Government

Delivering unparalleled diplomatic protection services.

We provide specialist protection for ambassadors, diplomats, and government officials. Our team brings direct experience supporting UK and international special envoys, with a thorough understanding of protocol, threat environments, and the unique demands of diplomatic security.

  • Ambassadorial and diplomatic close protection
  • Special envoy support and protection
  • Government official security details
  • Protocol-aware security planning
  • Threat assessment for diplomatic missions

Risk Consultancy

Professional corporate services — risk consultancy.

We help organisations understand and mitigate risks before they materialise. Our bespoke advisory services support businesses operating in complex or high-risk environments, providing the intelligence and strategic guidance required to make informed decisions.

  • Corporate risk assessment and mitigation
  • Threat analysis and intelligence reporting
  • Travel risk management for personnel
  • Due diligence and background investigation
  • Crisis management planning and response

Discuss Your Requirements

Each engagement begins with a confidential assessment of your needs.

Request a Consultation
Sangnoir

International risk management consultancy and security services provider. Safeguarding all that matters to you since 2011.
